Short CV

She graduated from Marmara University Faculty of Medicine in 1990. Between 1991-1993, she worked at the SSK Erenköy Mental Health and Diseases Hospital.

Between 1993-1999, she had her professional training in Marmara University, Faculty of Medicine Psychiatry Department and finished her thesis on “Sensory Seizure and Cognitive Functions in Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder”.

She received a “Special Award” in İstanbul Medical Chamber Dr. Cengiz Çetin Assistant Thesis Competition in 1999 due to her thesis. In 2000, she worked in the Greek Cypriot Hospital Anatolia Clinics. Since 2001, she has been working in NPSUAM Feneryolu Polyclinic.
